rules: All canonical URLs must be lowercase and trailing-slash normalized.
One canonical per route; no query strings in canonical URLs.
Tool result states should not be canonical URLs. Save/share states must use client-side/local storage or encoded fragments only if needed.
Download files and print views should canonicalize to their landing page.
UKPlanningGuide pages must not canonicalize to BuildingRegsGuide or vice versa; use normal cross-links only.
